title: T-Cut TCC500 Paintwork Restore Spray Paint Auto Car Metal 500ml - Restores Original Colour and Lustre to Paintwork - Removes Oxidation Scratches Road Grime & Rapid Paintwork Scratch Remover, 150g
features: Product 1: Restores original colour and lustre in seconds, removing oxidation, ingrained road grime, tar spots, and dried insects
Product 1: T-Cut Original contains no silicone and leaves no harmful residues
Product 1: The paintwork surface is rejuvenated and fully prepared for waxing or repainting
Product 1: T-Cut is also suitable for use on many painted surfaces found in the home, caravans, bikes, boats and antique restoration
Product 2: T-Cut Rapid Scratch for newer waterborne coatings, xirallics and metallic composite acrylic paints.
Product 2: Safely removes swirl marks, paint transfer, and light scratches.
Product 2: New Formula T-Cut that is specifically geared towards today's vehicles & consumer need.
Product 2: Does not contain silicone, or leave a harmful residue.
description: From the manufacturer T-Cut Original Colour Restorer Spray, 500 ml T-Cut Original Trigger Brand T-cut Color Original 500ml Finish Type Matte Size 500 Ml (pack Of 1) Item Volume 500.0 Milliliters T-Cut Rapid Paintwork Scratch Remover, 150g T-Cut Rapid Scratch Remover is the ultimate trouble shooter specially formulated to remove surface scratches, swirl marks and blemishes. Use on car paintwork, enamels, gloss painted surfaces, gel coats, ceramics and painted household appliances. T-Cut Rapid Scratch Remover does not contain silicone, or leave a harmful residue behind. Material Acrylic Brand T-cut Compatible Material Nickel Item Weight 170.0 Grams
